Links: [{"title":"Download .NET 8.0 (Linux, macOS, and Windows) | .NET","url":"https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet/8.0"},{"title":"Install .NET on Windows - .NET | Microsoft Learn","url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/install/windows"},{"title":"Microsoft Windows Desktop Runtime 8 - Download","url":"https://microsoft-windows-desktop-runtime-8.updatestar.com/"},{"title":"Browse all .NET versions to download | .NET","url":"https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet"},{"title":"Download Microsoft .NET Desktop Runtime - MajorGeeks","url":"https://www.majorgeeks.com/files/details/microsoft_net_runtime.html"},{"title":"Download .NET 8.0.1 LTS (Offline Installers)","url":"https://www.itechtics.com/net-801/"},{"title":"Install Microsoft .NET Windows Desktop Runtime 8.0 with winget - winstall","url":"https://winstall.app/apps/Microsoft.DotNet.DesktopRuntime.8"},{"title":"Chocolatey Software | Microsoft .NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime 8.0.25","url":"https://community.chocolatey.org/packages/dotnet-8.0-desktopruntime"},{"title":".NET 8.0 Download & Install for Windows 10/11 [x64 & x86]","url":"https://www.partitionwizard.com/news/net-8-download-install.html"},{"title":"Chocolatey Software | Microsoft .NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime 8.0.15","url":"https://community.chocolatey.org/packages/dotnet-8.0-desktopruntime/8.0.15"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found regarding the .NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime offline installer for Windows x64:

## Official Download Source

The official .NET 8.0 downloads for Windows are available at dotnet.microsoft.com. You can access the downloads at **https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet/8.0**

## How to Download

To download, select the version of .NET you want, find the SDK or Runtime box that contains the links for downloading .NET, and under the Installers column, find the Windows row and select the link for your CPU architecture (x64 is the most common).

## Installation Process

Navigate to where the file was downloaded (most likely your Downloads folder), double-click on the file to install .NET, and select Install and follow the instructions.

## Desktop Runtime Information

The .NET Desktop Runtime enables you to run existing Windows desktop applications and includes the .NET Runtime; you don't need to install it separately.

The search results also indicate that installation is handled via compact online installers or offline bundles from the official .NET download pages.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

input.prompt: Find the .NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime Windows x64 offline installer download link

content.content:
# .NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime Windows x64 Offline Installer

Based on the web page content, the download link for the **.NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime Windows x64 offline installer** is:

## Latest Version (8.0.25)

**Link:** `/en-us/download/dotnet/thank-you/runtime-desktop-8.0.25-windows-x64-installer`

**Full URL:** `https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet/thank-you/runtime-desktop-8.0.25-windows-x64-installer`

### Key Information:
- **Version:** 8.0.25 (Security patch released March 10, 2026)
- **Platform:** Windows x64
- **Type:** Offline installer
- **Purpose:** Enables running existing Windows desktop applications
- **Includes:** .NET Runtime (no separate installation needed)

### Alternative Versions Available:
- x86 installer: `runtime-desktop-8.0.25-windows-x86-installer`
- Arm64 installer: `runtime-desktop-8.0.25-windows-arm64-installer`
- Installation via winget: `winget` instructions available on the page

The .NET Desktop Runtime is specifically for running Windows desktop applications and includes the core .NET Runtime, so you don't need to install the base runtime separately.

## .NET 8.0 Desktop Runtime 오프라인 설치 프로그램

**공식 다운로드 페이지:** https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet/8.0

**최신 버전 (8.0.25) Windows x64 오프라인 설치 프로그램:**
- **직접 다운로드 링크:** `https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/download/dotnet/thank-you/runtime-desktop-8.0.25-windows-x64-installer`
- **릴리스 날짜:** 2026년 3월 10일 (보안 업데이트)

이 오프라인 설치 프로그램은 Windows 데스크톱 애플리케이션 실행에 필요한 .NET Runtime을 포함하고 있으므로 별도로 기본 런타임을 설치할 필요가 없습니다.
